Cross-Platform

Synapse is the desk hub that connects and coordinates your Bose headphones and earbuds into one seamless system.

An environment manager — not another device to manage.

The Ecosystem

One System. Three Components.

Desktop command unit

The Hub

AI-driven adaptive noise management that reads your environment and adjusts automatically — or override with the Context Dial for instant manual control. Charges wearables, syncs profiles, and routes audio across every connected device.

AI Auto-Adapt · Manual Context Dial · Device Routing · Wearable Charging

Over-ear + Earbuds

Hybrid Wearables

Flagship headphones for deep focus blocks. Lightweight earbuds for hallway walks and commutes. Seamless handoff as your day shifts.

Auto-switch · All-day comfort · Voice isolation

Ambient intelligence

Environmental Sensors

Ambient noise monitors that auto-adjust your masking profile in real time. Context-aware and always adapting to your environment.

Room sensing · Auto-adjust ANC · Learn patterns

Design Language

Functional Art

Slimmer profiles and refined materials. Beautiful because it's precise. Engineered to disappear.

The Experience

Here's What Your Tuesday Looks Like.

Synapse adapts automatically as your day shifts — no settings, no switching, no thinking about audio.

8:15 AM

Deep Focus

Headphones on. Hub sets ANC to max. Focus playlist streams from laptop.

9:30 AM

Teams Call

Phone rings — audio hands off in under 0.5 seconds. 16-mic array isolates your voice.

11:00 AM

Hallway Walk

You stand up. Audio shifts to earbuds. Transparency mode lets colleagues through.

2:00 PM

Noisy Corridor

Context Dial isolates a doctor's voice. Alarms and chatter suppressed.

5:45 PM

Commute Home

Earbuds stay in. Hub syncs tomorrow's focus profile. Day complete.

The Technology

Engineered to Prove It.

Every claim backed by real engineering. Not poetry — proof.

FLOW

<0.5s

Instant Handoff

Audio transitions between devices with zero friction. No manual pairing. No Bluetooth menus.

PROOF: Flow-Hub Architecture with dedicated hardware processor

COMFORT

8hrs

Thermal Resilience

Eliminates heat buildup that forces mid-day removal. Comfortable from first call to final commute.

PROOF: Aero-Wick Active Cooling with heat-wicking materials

FOCUS

16 mics

Selective Isolation

Hear exactly what matters. Suppress everything else. Isolate one voice in a crowded corridor.

PROOF: Context-Aware AI Array with selective hearing algorithms

FREEDOM

100%

Platform Agnostic

No ecosystem tax. Full features on every device, every OS. Works with Teams, Zoom, iOS, Windows, macOS.

PROOF: Agnostic DSP with full feature parity across all platforms

Questions

Frequently Asked

Synapse is a complete audio ecosystem: a desktop hub (the “brain”), over-ear headphones, earbuds, and environmental sensors that work together as one system. The hub connects and coordinates your wearables so audio follows you seamlessly throughout your day.
Yes. Synapse is fully platform agnostic with 100% feature parity across iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS. It works seamlessly with Teams, Zoom, and all major communication platforms.
The hub uses a dedicated hardware processor (Flow-Hub Architecture) to manage connections to your laptop and phone simultaneously. When a call comes in or you stand up and walk away, audio transitions to the right wearable in under 0.5 seconds — no manual pairing or Bluetooth menus.
The Context Dial is a physical control on the hub that lets you adjust your noise environment with a simple twist. Turn it to go from full noise cancellation to selective voice isolation — for example, focusing on one colleague's voice in a busy corridor while suppressing everything else.
The complete ecosystem: Synapse Hub, over-ear headphones, earbuds with charging case, environmental sensor, USB-C cable, and quick start guide. Founding member pricing is limited to the first production run.
